creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Not sure what the error is, but the build of pkg 1.4 seems to fail at the package stage.  Full log available on the URL in this ticket.

ln -s -f pkg-delete.8  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg-devel/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/pkg-remove.8
ln -s -f pkg-lock.8  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg-devel/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/pkg-unlock.8
ln -s -f pkg.8  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg-devel/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/pkg-static.8
 /bin/mkdir -p '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg-devel/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig'
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 libpkg/pkg.pc '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg-devel/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig'
install: DONTSTRIP set - will not strip installed binaries
